title: Anthropic's Brand New AI Just Started the Gold Rush (Fable 5)
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses Anthropic's new Claude Fable 5 model and its applications in regulated industries. The video covers new use cases for the model and introduces "Know Your Agent" methodology for effective context engineering in long-running AI applications.
writeup: Cyril Imhof breaks down Anthropic's new Claude Fable 5 model and its use in regulated industries. The video walks through fresh use cases for the model and introduces a "Know Your Agent" methodology aimed at context engineering for long-running AI applications. Key takeaways center on context management and how it supports AI agents operating over extended sessions.
